info.name: NhaDanShop API v10 - Auto-Generate Product Code
info.description:
v10: Tu dong generate product code theo category
BASE: http://localhost:8080 | ADMIN:admin/admin123 | USER:user/user123

=== AUTO-GENERATE PRODUCT CODE (v10 MOI) ===
Khi tao SP (single/batch/import-excel), neu de code=null hoac bo trong:
  -> He thong TU DONG generate: PREFIX + 3 so
  -> PREFIX = chu cai dau moi tu trong ten category (bo dau)
  -> VD: 'Banh Trang' -> BT, so lon nhat BT038 -> generate BT039
  -> VD: 'Muoi Ot' -> MO, chua co SP -> generate MO001
  -> Neu code duoc cung cap -> dung luon (upcase)

=== QUY TAC GIA ===
ATOMIC (bich/hop/chai): costPrice/sellPrice = gia 1 don vi
GOP (kg/xau): costPrice/sellPrice = gia 1 BICH (da chia)

=== THU TU ===
0.Health -> 1.Categories -> 2.Products/batch -> 3.Receipts -> 4.Invoices -> 5.Reports

request.description: Kiem tra DB users. Khong can auth.

=== TAO 57 SP (CHAY DAUTIEN) ===

QUY TAC GIA (v9 - DA SUA):
ATOMIC (bich/hop/chai):
  costPrice = gia nhap / 1 don vi do
  sellPrice = gia ban / 1 don vi do

GOP (kg/xau):
  costPrice trong request = gia von / 1 bich (da chia)
  sellPrice = gia ban / 1 bich le
  VD: BT006 kg=65000, pieces=10 -> cost/bich=6500, sell/bich=8500

Excel Import Service cung tu dong chia: cost/bich = cost_excel/pieces

request.description:
Tao SP KHONG co code -> he thong TU DONG generate.
Category 'Banh Trang' (id=1) -> prefix 'BT', SP lon nhat BT038 -> generate BT039.
Category 'Muoi Ot' (id=2) -> prefix 'MO' -> generate MO001 (neu prefix khac M).

Boolean tinh nang:
- code=null hoac bo trong (khong co truong code) -> TU DONG
- code='BT099' -> DUNG LUON code do (sau khi uppercase)

}

request.description:
Batch create KHONG co code -> he thong TU DONG generate cho tung SP.
SP 1: categoryId=1 (Banh Trang) -> BT039 (hoac so tiep theo)
SP 2: categoryId=2 (Muoi Ot) -> M010 (hoac so tiep theo)
SP 3: co code 'BT-CUSTOM' -> dung luon (upcase: BT-CUSTOM)

Co the mix: mot so co code, mot so de trong.

request.description:
Canh bao HH theo LO HANG (batch.expiryDate-today)
Response: ExpiryWarningResponse[]{batchId,batchCode,productId,productCode,productName,categoryName,sellUnit,remainingQty,expiryDate,daysRemaining,warningMessage}
Lo hang da HET HAN con ton kho (daysRemaining<=0, remainingQty>0)

Upload file Excel de tao san pham hang loat.

Cols (header row 1, data row 2+):
  A:code | B:name | C:categoryName | D:unit | E:costPrice | F:sellPrice
  G:stockQty | H:expiryDays | I:active | J:importUnit | K:sellUnit
  L:piecesPerImportUnit | M:conversionNote

TU DONG GENERATE CODE (v10):
  - Cot A (code) DE TRONG -> he thong tu dong generate code theo category
    VD: category='Banh Trang' -> BT039, BT040...
  - Cot A co gia tri -> dung luon (upcase)

QUY TAC GIA TRONG EXCEL:
  - ATOMIC (bich/hop/chai): nhap costPrice & sellPrice theo gia 1 don vi do
  - GOP (kg/xau): nhap costPrice & sellPrice theo gia 1 don vi NHAP (kg/xau)
    -> He thong TU DONG CHIA: costPerBich = costPrice/pieces

Response: {totalRows, successCount, skipCount, errorCount, errors[]}

formdata.description: File .xlsx chua danh sach san pham

request.description:
unitCost=gia/bich (ATOMIC: gia nhap=gia/don vi ban)
Batch: expiryDate=20/03/2026+180d=16/09/2026

item.name: POST R2 - BT005 xau + BT006-017 kg

request.description:
unitCost=gia/don vi NHAP (kg=65000/kg, xau=70000/xau)
He thong: cost/bich=unitCost/pieces
ton: kg*10, xau*7

unitCost=38000/hop (ATOMIC)
ton+=2 hop moi SP (khong chia)
unitCost=30000/xau; ton+=1*7=7 bich moi SP

M001-008: unitCost=gia/kg, ton+=10 bich
M009: unitCost=13000/chai, ton+=10 chai
CC008(5xau*5=+25bich) | CC010(5xau*5=+25bich)

=== NHAP PHIEU NHAP KHO TU EXCEL ===

Form-data params:
  file         : file .xlsx (required)
  supplierName : ten nha cung cap (required)
  note         : ghi chu phieu nhap (optional)

Cau truc Excel (row1=header, row2+=data):
  A: code    (ma SP - tim trong DB)
  B: name    (ten SP - fallback neu khong co code)
  C: quantity (so luong DON VI NHAP: kg/xau/hop/bich/chai)
  D: unitCost (gia/1 don vi NHAP)
  E: note    (ghi chu dong, optional)

He thong tu dong:
  ATOMIC (bich/hop/chai): retailQty=qty, costPerUnit=unitCost
  GOP (kg/xau): retailQty=qty*pieces, costPerUnit=unitCost/pieces
  Tao ProductBatch voi expiryDate=ngayNhap+product.expiryDays

Vi du Excel tu hinh:
  BT006 | BT Rong bien | 1 | 65000  -> +10 bich, cost/bich=6500
  BT019 | BT Cuon tep  | 2 | 38000  -> +2 hop (ATOMIC)
  CC010 | Com Chay c.. | 5 | 125000 -> +25 bich, cost/bich=25000

Response:
  {receiptNo, supplierName, totalRows, successItems,
   skippedItems, errorItems, totalAmount, errors[], warnings[]}

formdata.description: Excel: A=code|B=name|C=quantity(don vi nhap)|D=unitCost(gia/don vi nhap)|E=note

formdata.value: Cong ty TNHH Banh Trang Tay Ninh

request.description:
quantity=so bich/hop/chai ban le thuc te
FEFO tu dong tru lo cu nhat
Profit=qty*(sell-costSnapshot)
id18(hop:sell=50000/hop)|id26(bich:sell=6000/bich)
id39(bich tu kg:sell=11000/bich)|id47(chai:sell=17000/chai)
Huy HD: hoan ton kho+batch FEFO

profit=sum(qty*(sellPrice-costSnapshot))
costSnapshot=weighted avg FEFO
Don vi: dong VND

opening=currentStock-nhap(from->now)+ban(from->now)
closing=opening+nhapKy-banKy
closingValue=sum(batch.remainingQty*batch.costPrice)

item.name: 6. Expiry Warning - Canh bao HH Lot

request.description: Lo het han con ton (daysRemaining<=0, remainingQty>0)
ProductBatchResponse[] - chi tiet lot (importQty,receiptNo,costPrice...)
FEFO: sort expiryDate ASC, chi lo con hang
CHECK: importQty=10 bich (1kg*10), costPrice=6500/bich
CHECK: importQty=2 hop (ATOMIC), costPrice=38000/hop
CHECK: importQty=10 chai (ATOMIC), costPrice=13000/chai
CHECK: importQty=25 bich (5xau*5), costPrice=18400/bich
CHECK: importQty=2 hop moi SP
M001-008: importQty=10 bich each | M009: importQty=10 chai
CC008(id55):importQty=25 | CC010(id57):importQty=25
